or custom)"] end APP -->|addView| LOGIN LOGIN -->|merges| CONFIG LOGIN -->|registers| TEMPLATES LOGIN -->|registers| CSS LOGIN -->|parse| TP LOGIN -->|inject| CM LOGIN -->|DOM reads/writes| CA LOGIN -->|setValueByHash| MAN MAN -->|reads/writes| APPDATA LOGIN -->|fetch| AUTH LOGIN -.->|hooks| APP APP -.->|post-auth| ROUTER ","style":"notebook"}
